final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing marketing poster for UGREEN NAS brand's 618 Anniversary Celebration e-commerce announcement.

Style/medium: commercial e-commerce poster, clean modern tech aesthetic, flat vector illustration with subtle depth
Composition: centered layout with bold headline at top, product focal point in middle, promotional details at bottom, balanced white space
Subject: UGREEN NAS (Network Attached Storage) device, sleek minimalist design with subtle LED indicator, floating or on clean pedestal
Scene/backdrop: abstract gradient background with soft tech-inspired geometric shapes, subtle grid pattern, celebratory atmosphere
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting with gentle rim light on product, professional and trustworthy mood
Color palette: UGREEN brand green as primary anchor, white and light gray as base, accent gold or orange for "618" celebration elements
Text (verbatim): "绿联私有云品牌618周年庆活动电商宣布海报"
Constraints: must work as square social media post and banner crop; text area must remain legible at small sizes
Avoid: cluttered composition, generic stock photo aesthetic, hard shadows, overly complex illustrations, watermark, 8K stuffer language
